sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31122" key="ei(ma/rshn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἱμάρσην</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ενος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n31122.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">woman clad in man's dress</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0208.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Dosiad.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ara</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
